stops.name: Piraeus
stops.note: Cast off from the port of Athens on the evening steamer.

stops.name: Mykonos
stops.note: Wake among the whitewashed lanes and windmills.

stops.name: Áno Merá
stops.note: Drive across the island to the monastery in the hills.

stops.name: Naxos
stops.note: Take the ferry south to the great marble gateway.

stops.name: Apeíranthos
stops.note: Climb the mountain road to the old emery village.

stops.name: Santorini
stops.note: Sail south into the caldera as the cliffs turn gold.

stops.name: Oia
stops.note: Walk the rim path to the white village at the island's tip.
